2930f338f80d.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
2930f338f80d.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
2930f338f80d.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

1cc0ccf76f07.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
1cc0ccf76f07.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

a305bef7ff1b.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
a305bef7ff1b.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
a305bef7ff1b.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

8d5b64e758f7.title: Accelerate review volume — you're credible but not dominant
8d5b64e758f7.description: At 141 reviews, your rating is stable but not commanding. Venues with 200+ reviews rank higher in Maps. A post-visit review prompt would compound monthly.
